title: Coding with AI
content: At BarkinMad Studios, AI is used as a development assistant to help accelerate coding, debugging, UI ideas, localisation, content creation, and rapid prototyping across multiple projects.

Projects such as [ZXSnake](/apps/zxsnake), [ZXBrick](/apps/zxbrick), [ZXSpace](/apps/zxspace), and the wider [ZX Series](/zx-series) have all benefited from AI-assisted workflows, allowing more time to focus on gameplay, polish, testing, and creativity.

AI can help generate ideas, review code, identify bugs, explain unfamiliar technologies, and speed up repetitive development tasks. This allows smaller development teams to achieve more with limited resources.

However, AI does not replace developers. Architecture decisions, optimisation, game design, product direction, testing, and final implementation still require human creativity, experience, and judgement.
For independent developers, AI has become a powerful tool that helps turn ideas into working products faster than ever before while reducing the time spent on repetitive tasks.

As AI technology continues to evolve, BarkinMad Studios will continue exploring ways to use these tools responsibly to improve development workflows while maintaining full creative control over games and applications.
